notes: Primarily a practice-grounded experience report (IEEE Software style) synthesizing the authors' work on internally developed MVPs into a flow-debt conceptualization, a guideline matrix, and a checklist; illustrated with anecdotal case scenarios (e.g., RefactAI). Contains one small empirical element: an agentic security scan of seven vibe-coded MVPs yielding 970 issues. Evidence is explicitly qualitative/experiential, not a controlled study; no human-subjects data (informal co-author discussions are not a structured study).
